title: Choice of a certain translation strategy

evidence.clean_text: Choice of a certain transl ation strategy is determined by either translation norms, translator’s decision by depending on their knowledge and understanding to describe the term, and language norms where the nature of the language imposes addition or deletion of certain structures. In some cases, both translator’s decision and language norms work together as determinants of a specific translation strategy as in the translation of the absolute object المفعول المطلق.
